title: Adjustments that you show on the supplementary section of your tax return 2020
description: Instructions for completing adjustments in the supplementary tax return.
keywords: TaxPack, adjustments, supplementary, 2020, tax return, family trust, family trust distribution, paper tax return, paper form, paper return, paper lodgement

content_blocks.text: Did you receive a distribution during 2019–20 on which family trust distribution tax has been paid?

rows: Read question A5 Amount on which family trust distribution tax has been paid 2020 . You may be entitled to an adjustment.

content_blocks.text: Did you make a payment to us more than 14 days before the due date for payment?

rows: Read question C1 Credit for interest on early payments 2020 . You may be able to claim credit for interest on early payments.
Go to M1 Medicare levy reduction or exemption 2020 .

content_text:
## Completing your tax return
Did you receive a distribution during 2019–20 on which family trust distribution tax has been paid?
Yes | Read question A5 Amount on which family trust distribution tax has been paid 2020 . You may be entitled to an adjustment.
No | Read on.
Did you make a payment to us more than 14 days before the due date for payment?
Yes | Read question C1 Credit for interest on early payments 2020 . You may be able to claim credit for interest on early payments.
No | Go to M1 Medicare levy reduction or exemption 2020 .
